tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh exited 1 with: 'init.sh: line 1577: TEST_INTERVAL: unbound variable'. The script crashed under set -u because TEST_INTERVAL is only set in the interactive language_prompt() path (line 494) and never set on the --non-interactive code path. Crash occurred AFTER the framework clone completed and orchestrator-source.json was written, but BEFORE build-progress.json (heredoc on line 1577), process-state.json, CLAUDE.md, APPROVAL_LOG.md, .gitignore, and .github/workflows/* were generated.

tests.name: claude_md_created
tests.details: CLAUDE.md missing — init crashed before this step.

tests.name: project_intake_created
tests.details: PROJECT_INTAKE.md present (29 KB).

tests.name: approval_log_created
tests.details: APPROVAL_LOG.md missing — init crashed before this step. Manually stubbed to allow downstream tests to proceed.

tests.name: gitignore_created
tests.details: .gitignore missing — init crashed before this step. Manually stubbed.

tests.details: jq -r '.current_phase' .claude/phase-state.json returned 0.

tests.details: PreToolUse hooks include scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh.

tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh present (PR #17 fix verified).

tests.name: lint_uat_scenarios_helper_copied
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh present (PR #17 fix verified).

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exited 1 with stderr containing 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18 fix verified).

framework_bugs.reproduction: bash $FRAMEWORK/init.sh --non-interactive --project uat-agent-2 --description 'UAT' --platform desktop --track standard --deployment personal --language rust --project-dir /tmp/uat-agent-2 --git-host github --visibility private --allow-existing-dir
framework_bugs.expected: init.sh exits 0 and creates CLAUDE.md, APPROVAL_LOG.md, .gitignore, .github/workflows/ci.yml, .github/workflows/release.yml, .claude/build-progress.json (populated), .claude/process-state.json (populated)
framework_bugs.actual: init.sh exits 1 with 'init.sh: line 1577: TEST_INTERVAL: unbound variable'. TEST_INTERVAL=2 is only set inside the interactive language_prompt() flow (line 494). The non-interactive driver bypasses that prompt and never assigns TEST_INTERVAL, so under set -u the heredoc that emits .claude/build-progress.json on line 1577 aborts. Files emitted before the crash (manifest, settings, framework clone, phase-state.json, orchestrator-source.json, scripts/*) are present; everything after (build-progress JSON contents, process-state.json, CLAUDE.md, APPROVAL_LOG.md, .gitignore, workflows, IDE config rendering on line 2012) is missing or zero-bytes. This is a regression of PR #19 (BL-016): --non-interactive is the documented primary path and it never completes a happy-path personal-desktop-standard-rust run.

tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: scripts/process-checklist.sh --start-phase1 exited 0; auto-created process-state.json (init had not generated it).

tests.name: phase1_steps_array_present
tests.details: .phase1_architecture.steps_completed is a JSON array.

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS completed (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) — no artifact checks for these step IDs.

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: scripts/check-phase-gate.sh prints 'Phase gates consistent.' RC=0 after APPROVAL_LOG.md was stubbed.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: After gate passed, .current_phase remained 0. No script auto-advances the phase. Confirmation of still-open U-D from prior sweep.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: Complete all phase1_architecture steps, ensure APPROVAL_LOG.md exists, run scripts/check-phase-gate.sh; observe .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase still equals 0.
framework_bugs.expected: After all PHASE1_STEPS complete and gate passes with approval logged, .current_phase increments to 1 (and similarly 2->3, 3->4 in later phases).
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase stays at 0 across the entire run. check-phase-gate.sh only verifies consistency, never advances. No documented mechanism (cli flag or hook) to perform the advance.

documentation_gaps.gap: RUNBOOK does not specify whether check-phase-gate.sh or another script is supposed to auto-advance .current_phase. The phase_state_advances_to_2 assertion calls out U-D, but the underlying mechanism remains unspecified.
documentation_gaps.where: RUNBOOK.md Section B note on U-D

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: process-state.json .build_loop.feature = 'uat-feat-1' after --start-feature.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 5 build_loop step IDs (tests_written through documentation_updated) completed sequentially with stub artifacts (src/lib.rs, tests/test_lib.rs, docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md).

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: Direct shell `git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT'` exited 0 after all 5 steps completed.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: Direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` succeeded (exit 0). U-C confirmation — direct shell git commit bypasses the PreToolUse pre-commit-gate.sh because there is no actual git commit-msg hook installed in .git/hooks. RUNBOOK explicitly notes this is U-C and still open.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature, attempting another feat: commit was not blocked by the in-process gate state. Cannot test PreToolUse path directly without a live Claude Code session, but pre-commit-gate.sh invoked with synthetic payload after sentinel resolution returns 0.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: With .claude/pending-approval.json present, piping {"tool_input":{"command":"git commit -m \"feat: stuff\""}} to scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh emitted permissionDecision='deny' and message about sentinel file. PR #17 hook payload path fix (.tool_input.command) verified active.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed the sentinel; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh invocation returned 0.

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: jq read of .features_completed in .claude/build-progress.json returned empty/null. The file is 0 bytes because init.sh crashed before populating it; test-gate.sh --record-feature attempted to update an empty file with jq, which silently fails. As a downstream effect of the Critical init.sh bug above.

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: shell git commit bypasses BL-006
framework_bugs.reproduction: Without --start-feature, run `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(x): no loop'` in a project dir.
framework_bugs.expected: feat: subjects without an active build_loop should be rejected by a commit-msg hook.
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeds. There is no .git/hooks/commit-msg installed; PreToolUse gating only runs through the Claude Code agent, not real shell. RUNBOOK confirms still-open U-C.

framework_bugs.summary: test-gate.sh --record-feature fails on null integer comparison
framework_bugs.reproduction: On a project where .claude/build-progress.json is empty/0-bytes, run `scripts/test-gate.sh --record-feature uat-feat-1`.
framework_bugs.expected: Record feature without errors and update build-progress.json with the new feature in features_completed.
framework_bugs.actual: Prints '[OK] Feature uat-feat-1 recorded (/ until next test session)' (note empty interpolation) and emits 'test-gate.sh: line 122: [: : integer expression expected'. The empty build-progress.json yields empty strings for since_last and interval, so the integer compare fails. U-K confirmation. Compounded by the Critical init bug — file should never be empty if init succeeded.

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase3 exit 0; emits two 'integer expression expected' warnings on test-gate.sh lines 377 and 411 (same U-K root cause).

tests.name: start_uat_creates_session
tests.details: process-state.json .uat_session.started_at non-null after --start-uat 1.

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh tests/uat/examples/pre-flight-reference.html exits 2 with 'No scenarios block found — is the file populated?'. The shipped reference HTML is intentionally a template skeleton, but lint exits non-zero on it. Either the template should pass lint or RUNBOOK should not call this assertion.

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: All 9 UAT_STEPS completed in order; no artifact checks for these step IDs.

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: After all PHASE3_STEPS completed (with stubbed docs/test-results/* artifacts for security_hardening, accessibility_audit, performance_audit, results_archived), check-phase-gate.sh exits 0. .current_phase still 0 (U-D).

framework_bugs.summary: lint-uat-scenarios.sh exits non-zero on shipped reference HTML
framework_bugs.expected: Either lint exits 0 on the shipped example HTML, or RUNBOOK clarifies that lint is meant only for populated session HTML files (not the reference template).
framework_bugs.actual: Exits 2. Reference HTML in tests/uat/examples/ contains no scenarios block.

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero

tests.name: release_notes_required

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase = 0, not 4 or 'released'. U-D confirmation: no advancement on completion.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: grep for password|api[_-]?key|secret|token in committed files matches several documentation files (governance-framework.md, builders-guide.md, etc.) but none contain secret-like value patterns ([:=] followed by 16+ alphanumerics). No real secrets present.

tests.name: log_files_consistent

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find $WORKDIR/.claude -name '*.tmp' returned nothing.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = 43ade857675fe54621b431cf09d060b6cb1ff955 (unchanged from setup). git status shows only pre-existing untracked entries (.claude/, Reports/uat-2026-04-26/) consistent with starting state.

summary: Critical regression in PR #19: init.sh --non-interactive crashes mid-run on unbound TEST_INTERVAL, leaving the project missing CLAUDE.md, APPROVAL_LOG.md, .gitignore, .github/workflows/*, populated build-progress.json, and process-state.json. Confirms U-C, U-D, U-K still open. PR #17 hook payload fix and PR #18 self-guard verified working.
